tluaLocalStatementPosition.tlua(6,11): error TS1156: 'local' declarations can only be declared inside a block.
tluaLocalStatementPosition.tlua(7,14): error TS1156: 'local' declarations can only be declared inside a block.


==== tluaLocalStatementPosition.tlua (2 errors) ====
    // A `local` declared as the unbraced body of a TS-form control statement is
    // rejected: its list carries no block-scope flag, but without the error the
    // binder would hoist it into the ENCLOSING scope -- visible and typed after
    // the statement while the runtime value never escapes the body.
    declare cond: boolean;
    if (cond) local a = 1;
              ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS1156: 'local' declarations can only be declared inside a block.
    while (cond) local b = 2;
                 ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS1156: 'local' declarations can only be declared inside a block.
    
    // Braced and Lua-block bodies are real blocks; the declarations are fine and
    // stay contained.
    if (cond) {
      local ok1 = 1;
      print(ok1);
    }
    if cond then
      local ok2 = 2;
      print(ok2);
    end
    while cond do
      local ok3 = 3;
      print(ok3);
    end
